projectDescription: SimpleX is a privacy-first open-source messaging platform with no user identifiers of any kind, offering end-to-end encrypted messaging via a decentralized network of relay servers — with mobile apps, a terminal CLI, and a bot API for developers.
keyFeatures: No user identifiers of any kind — not even random IDs or public keys assigned to users
Double ratchet E2E encryption with an additional NaCl crypto_box layer
Decentralized network of SMP relay servers — self-host or use pre-configured servers
XFTP protocol for metadata-protected, chunked, multi-recipient file transfer
Mobile apps (iOS and Android), multiplatform desktop, and terminal CLI
Incognito mode generates a unique random profile per contact
Bot API via WebSocket JSON interface with TypeScript, Python, and Node.js SDKs
TLS 1.3 transport encryption with optional Tor integration
Local SQLite (or PostgreSQL) encrypted chat database
Audited by Trail of Bits (2022 and 2024)
publicApiSurface: ChatClient.create(server, config) — TypeScript/Node.js SDK entry point
ChatClient.sendChatCmd(cmd) — send a raw CLI command over WebSocket
ChatClient.apiGetActiveUser() — get active user profile
ChatClient.apiCreateActiveUser(profile) — create a new user profile
ChatClient.apiSendTextMessage(chatType, chatId, text) — send a text message
ChatClient.apiSendMessages(chatType, chatId, messages) — send multiple messages
ChatClient.apiUpdateChatItem(...) — edit a sent message
ChatClient.apiDeleteChatItems(...) — delete chat items
ChatClient.enableAddressAutoAccept() — auto-accept incoming contact requests
ChatClient.apiGetUserAddress() / apiCreateUserAddress() — manage contact address
bot.on_message(content_type, text) — Python decorator for message handlers
bot.on_command(name) — Python decorator for slash-command handlers
bot.on_event(tag) — Python decorator for raw event handlers
bot.run() — Python: start the bot and block
WebSocket JSON protocol: {corrId, cmd} request / {corrId, resp} response
ChatCommand ADT (Haskell) — APICreateMyAddress, APISendMessages, APIAddMember, etc.
ChatEvent types — NewChatItems, ContactConnected, ReceivedGroupInvitation, RcvFileComplete, etc.
simplex-chat CLI flags: -p (WebSocket port), --command, --store-log, --db-file-prefix
smp-server init / xftp-server init — server initialization commands
smp-server start / xftp-server start — server startup commands
